issues.description: The translation renders 'CMN' as '核心网格网络'. In ARM's architecture, CMN stands for 'Coherent Mesh Network'. Translating 'Coherent' as '核心' (Core) is a technical mistranslation that loses the critical architectural concept of cache coherency.
issues.why_it_matters: Cache coherency is a fundamental concept in multi-core and multi-die CPU interconnects. A mistranslation here undermines the technical credibility of the text.
issues.suggestion: Change '核心网格网络 (CMN)' to '一致性网格网络 (CMN)'.

issues.description: The text translates 'reticle size' as '掩膜尺寸'. In semiconductor manufacturing, 'reticle' in the context of die size limits is standardly translated as '光罩' (as noted in the provided glossary: 'Reticle-sized → 光罩极限尺寸').
issues.why_it_matters: Using '光罩' aligns with industry-standard semiconductor terminology and maintains consistency with the glossary.
issues.suggestion: Change '半掩膜尺寸' to '半光罩尺寸'.
